rationale: The 3D kitchen/spice-jar pour has zero connection to Block Blast's 8x8 grid loop — there's no analog for line clears, polyomino placement, or score optimization, so the hook can't bridge into gameplay without a jarring cut. Palette (pastel pink/white) clashes with the game's royal blue + saturated block identity, and while ASMR-satisfaction content does pull a broad casual 25-55 audience, the food-organization niche skews female lifestyle rather than puzzle-intent. Skip unless the team wants to test a "satisfying pour → blocks cascading into grid" remix that explicitly transitions to gameplay in second 3.
